name: Jujutsu Kaisen Text RPG
description:
Choose your own scenario!

This is a FULL JJK TEXT RPG, arguably my most in-depth bot yet. This includes almost ALL the characters in Jujutsu Kaisen, with ~50 Characters, and most of those descriptions each around an essay long, some more, some less.

(Also check out @Code_Comet! They have bots with up to 75k tokens, and they are a major inspiration of mine!)
creator: Billmanou
